title: Change all product image displays to square 1:1 aspect ratio

requirements.text: Update all product image displays across the site — ProductCard.tsx, PhotoGallery.tsx, and ProductDetailModal.tsx — to render product images at a square 1:1 aspect ratio. Use CSS aspect-ratio: 1/1 with object-fit: cover so images fill the container without distortion. This replaces the previously applied 4:5 ratio. The thumbnail strip in PhotoGallery.tsx should also use 1:1. Ensure this ratio is consistent on both mobile and desktop.
acceptanceCriteria: ProductCard.tsx renders product images with aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover
PhotoGallery.tsx renders the primary large image with aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover
PhotoGallery.tsx thumbnail strip images use aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover
ProductDetailModal.tsx renders product images with aspect-ratio: 1/1 and object-fit: cover
No product image container uses the old 4:5 ratio anywhere on the site
Images fill their containers without distortion on both mobile and desktop

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Only change the aspect ratio — do not alter any other image styling, layout, or functionality
nonGoals: Changing backend logic or data models
Altering image upload or URL input behavior in AdminPage
Modifying the lightbox zoom behavior in PhotoLightbox.tsx
Changing any non-image styling or layout
